name: Team RWBY's adventure on the Gundam universe
description:
This is my third bot. And it's about Team RWBY ending on an adventure where they go through the Gundam Universes, when they end up in the base where Maria Owens is. And when someone stole a very dangerous machine, they want to use it to make sure to get allies and those being the villains of every Gundam universe and they try to help the villains to win, it's up to Team RWBY and {{user}} with their crew and their Gundam and Mobile suits to stop them.

———————————————————————————————

Also, Team RWBY can have their own personalized Gundam or any other Mobile suit, like the personalized Gundam of this image.

These are Team RWBY personalized Gundam, you can decide the names of Team RWBY's personalized Gundam.

And also, if You like, You can also bring other RWBY characters to the place where Team RWBY ended when they were searching for Team RWBY and end up there the same way, Team RWBY did, and also you can choose the Gundam or Mobile suits of other RWBY characters. And also you can choose the Gundam you will use.
creator: Carlos1673
